sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n68098" key="misostratiw/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μῑσο-στρᾰτιώτης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n68098.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">the soldier's enemy</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:1:179" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.179</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
